title: trichosanthes tricuspidata subsp. javanica
intro: Trichosanthes tricuspidata subsp. javanica is a subspecies of the Trichosanthes genus, commonly known as the Javanese snake gourd or Javanese five-angle vine. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Trichosanthes tricuspidata subsp. javanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support respiratory health. The plant is often prepared as a herbal decoction or powder, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
